title: The Merry Is Ready for the Stream
description: Bellamy steals Cricket’s gold and attacks the dreamers, forcing Luffy to answer the insult directly.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mont Blanc Cricket, Luffy, Nami. Bellamy steals Cricket’s gold and attacks the dreamers, forcing Luffy to answer the insult directly.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Shouldn't be going around talkin' about pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: I can't run any more too!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: That's it! I'm shooting to kill!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As long as I calm see it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Damn it... Who the hell did this!?

dialogue.speaker: Shojo
dialogue.text: Just tell me what happened first, Mister!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's fine, just forget about that....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What we need to worry about is-

summary: Bellamy steals Cricket’s gold and attacks the dreamers, forcing Luffy to answer the insult directly.
